hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys, json; cmd = json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\", \"\"); bad = any(x in cmd for x in [\"electron-builder\", \"npm run package\", \"git tag \", \"git push --tags\", \"git push origin v\"]); print(\"BLOCK: deploy gate — explicit user instruction required\" if bad else \"\"); exit(2 if bad else 0)"'
